name: SLICK Orchestrator
description: Master execution node for Project Slick. Receives geopolitical news artifacts from the Sentinel, queries the Quant for xyz:BRENTOIL order book state, and uses Gemini to score trade conviction before firing orders on Hyperliquid.

skills.name: Analyze Geopolitical Event
skills.description: Accepts a news headline and screenshot artifact, queries on-chain liquidity, runs Gemini sentiment scoring, and executes a leveraged long on xyz:BRENTOIL if conviction threshold is met.
